title: New #1 open-source AI model is here!
summary: GLM 5.2 is promoted as a leading open-source AI model capable of handling multimodal tasks including digital earth visualization, animation with voiceover, 3D model generation, ray tracing, music composition, and mathematics animation. The video reviews its capabilities and integration options including use as a Claude code plugin.
writeup: AI Search reviews GLM 5.2, presenting it as the new top open-source AI model. The video walks through capabilities including 3D model generation, animation with voiceover, music composition, and math animation, and includes benchmark comparisons against other models. Coverage also addresses the model's open-source availability. The takeaway: a freely available model is positioned at the front of the open-source field across several generative tasks.
